message:
feat(deploy): add direct Cloudflare API upload for Pages deployment

Add blake3 and mime_guess dependencies for computing file hashes and
content types when uploading directly to Cloudflare Pages API.

deploy_cloudflare.rs improvements:
- Support direct API upload without wrangler CLI
- Prerequisites check now allows API-only deployment
- Use Blake3 for manifest hashes (Cloudflare requirement)
- MIME type detection for proper Content-Type headers
- Multi-part form upload for asset bundles

This enables deployment from environments where wrangler isn't installed
but API credentials are available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,6 +48,8 @@ dirs = "*"
 walkdir = "*"
 glob = "*"
 base64 = ">=0.21"
+blake3 = "*"
+mime_guess = "*"
 pulldown-cmark = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["html"] }
 chrono = { version = "*", features = ["serde"] }
 semver = "*"
